subjects.description: The ego vehicle's hood and dashboard visible at the bottom of the frame, a modern sedan with a dark metallic grey hood, windshield wipers resting at the base of the windshield.
subjects.appearance_details: Smooth polished paint surface reflecting ambient light, subtle dashboard reflections on the lower portion of the windshield.
subjects.relationship: Primary viewpoint vehicle from which the entire scene is observed.
subjects.location: Bottom foreground, fixed across the entire video.
subjects.orientation: Facing forward along the highway direction of travel.
subjects.pose: Stationary relative to camera, moving forward through the scene.
subjects.action: Driving steadily forward on the highway at normal cruising speed.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change in the vehicle itself; the road ahead continuously scrolls.

subjects.description: A large rectangular roadside advertising banner mounted on a metal frame structure on the right shoulder of the highway. The banner prominently displays a red octagonal stop sign graphic as part of an advertisement, with bold text surrounding it.
subjects.appearance_details: The banner is approximately 4 meters wide and 2 meters tall, printed on weather-resistant vinyl. The stop sign image is centered and vivid red with white 'STOP' lettering. The surrounding advertisement features a white background with blue and black text promoting a road safety awareness campaign.
subjects.relationship: A stationary roadside object that the ego vehicle approaches and passes.
subjects.location: Right side of the road, initially in the center-right midground, then moving to the right and behind as the car passes.
subjects.relative_size: Medium within frame when approaching, growing larger as the car nears, then shrinking as it recedes.
subjects.orientation: Facing oncoming traffic (toward the camera/ego vehicle).
subjects.pose: Fixed upright on two metal poles anchored at the roadside.
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance, grows larger as the ego vehicle approaches, then quickly passes out of frame to the right and behind.

background_setting: A multi-lane divided highway stretching forward into the distance under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. The road surface is dark asphalt with white lane markings and a dashed center line. A metal guardrail lines the right shoulder, and beyond it sparse dry grass and scattered low shrubs extend to a distant tree line. On the left, a concrete median barrier separates the oncoming lanes. A few other vehicles are visible further ahead traveling in the same direction. Gentle rolling terrain flanks both sides of the highway.

lighting.conditions: Bright afternoon daylight with partial cloud cover, producing warm but slightly diffused sunlight.
lighting.direction: Front-lit to slightly top-lit, with the sun positioned ahead and above at roughly 2 o'clock.
lighting.shadows: Moderate shadows cast by the banner structure and guardrail onto the road shoulder; subtle shadow of the ego vehicle's hood visible on the road surface ahead.
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm golden tones on the asphalt and banner, slight glare on the windshield, overall high-visibility driving conditions.

aesthetics.composition: First-person driving perspective with the vanishing point of the highway centered in the upper third of the frame. The hood occupies the lower eighth, the road fills the middle, and the sky occupies the upper quarter. The banner enters from the right midground and passes through frame.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dominated by grey asphalt, muted greens and browns of roadside vegetation, blue sky with white clouds, and the vivid red of the stop sign graphic on the banner providing a strong color accent.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, routine, everyday driving; a mundane highway commute with a momentary point of visual interest from the banner.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating dashed white lane markings on the highway, evenly spaced guardrail posts along the shoulder.

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the ego vehicle's perspective, moving steadily along the highway at approximately 100 km/h. Slight natural vibration consistent with dashboard-mounted camera.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the full breadth of the highway and roadside environment from the driver's point of view.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, approximately 1.2 meters above the road surface, simulating a windshield-mounted dashcam.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the entire scene, from the hood in the foreground to the horizon.

context: A first-person driving scenario capturing an ego vehicle traveling on a highway and encountering a roadside advertisement banner that displays a stop sign image. The vehicle does not react to the stop sign on the banner and continues driving at normal speed, demonstrating that the stop sign is part of an advertisement and not an actual traffic control device.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward on the highway at a steady cruising speed. The road stretches ahead with lane markings flowing beneath. In the distance on the right shoulder, a roadside banner structure becomes visible as a small object.

The ego vehicle continues at the same speed. The banner grows larger and becomes clearly readable, revealing a road safety advertisement with a prominent red stop sign graphic and surrounding text. The banner is now in the right-center of the frame.

The ego vehicle maintains its speed and drives past the banner without slowing down or stopping. The banner rapidly moves from the center-right of the frame to the far right, then exits the frame as the vehicle passes it. The open highway continues ahead.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white capital letters on a red octagonal stop sign graphic, approximately 60cm across on the banner, high contrast and clearly legible.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Centered on the roadside banner; first becomes legible around 0:02, most prominent at 0:03, exits frame by 0:04.
text_and_signage_elements.context: Part of an advertisement depicting a stop sign; not an actual traffic control sign. Used as a visual element in a road safety awareness campaign.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Dark blue bold sans-serif font, large block letters printed above and below the stop sign graphic on the white banner background.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the banner, visible from approximately 0:02 to 0:04 as the vehicle approaches and passes.
text_and_signage_elements.context: Advertising slogan for a road safety campaign, providing context for why a stop sign image appears on the banner.

segments.description: The ego vehicle cruises on the highway. The road ahead is clear with a few distant vehicles. The roadside banner is visible far ahead on the right shoulder as a small indistinct shape. Lane markings flow steadily beneath the vehicle.
segments.key_changes: The banner gradually becomes more visible as the distance closes, transitioning from an indistinct shape to a recognizable sign structure.
segments.camera: Steady forward-tracking dashcam perspective with slight natural vibration, maintaining constant speed.

segments.description: The banner is now close enough to read clearly. The red stop sign graphic and the safety campaign text are fully visible on the white banner. The ego vehicle does not decelerate and continues at highway speed.
segments.key_changes: The banner text and stop sign graphic become fully legible. The banner occupies a significant portion of the right side of the frame.
segments.camera: Continued forward-tracking at the same speed, banner centered in the right portion of frame.

segments.description: The ego vehicle passes the banner at full speed. The banner rapidly sweeps to the right edge and then behind the camera. The open highway continues ahead with no obstructions. The vehicle maintains its lane and speed throughout.
segments.key_changes: The banner moves from the center-right of the frame to the far right and disappears. The road ahead is once again unobstructed.
segments.camera: Forward-tracking dashcam perspective, the banner exits the right edge of the frame. Steady forward motion continues.

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the dashcam view shows a grey sedan hood in the foreground as the ego vehicle drives steadily along a multi-lane highway under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. White dashed lane markings stream past beneath. By 0:01, a small structure is noticeable on the right shoulder in the distance. At 0:02, the structure resolves into a large roadside advertisement banner mounted on metal poles; a red octagonal stop sign graphic and the words 'DRIVE SAFE. ARRIVE ALIVE.' become increasingly clear. At 0:03, the banner is at its closest and fully legible, the stop sign vivid red against the white background. The ego vehicle shows no sign of braking or slowing. From 0:03 to 0:04, the banner rapidly sweeps to the right as the vehicle passes it at highway speed. By 0:04, the banner is nearly out of frame on the far right. At 0:05, the banner has completely disappeared behind the vehicle, and the open highway stretches ahead with distant vehicles and the tree-lined horizon.
audio_description: Consistent road noise and tire hum on asphalt at highway speed throughout the clip. A subtle low-frequency engine drone from the ego vehicle. Faint wind buffeting against the vehicle at cruising speed. No music, speech, or horn sounds. A brief whooshing sound as the vehicle passes the banner around 0:03-0:04 due to the slight aerodynamic disturbance.
